# SEOPlaner

> SEOPlaner is an IT services agency specializing in SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), and
> GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) for IT and software companies. We help clients rank higher
> on Google and get cited as a source by AI answer engines such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini,
> and Google AI Overviews.

## Company
- Website: https://www.seoplaner.com
- Contact: hello@seoplaner.com
- Services: Search Engine Optimization, Answer Engine Optimization, Generative Engine Optimization, Content Strategy

## Key pages
- [Services overview](https://www.seoplaner.com/services): All service lines in one place.
- [SEO](https://www.seoplaner.com/services/seo): Technical SEO, on-page optimization, and link earning.
- [AEO](https://www.seoplaner.com/services/aeo): Structuring content to be selected as the direct answer in AI Overviews and voice assistants.
- [GEO](https://www.seoplaner.com/services/geo): Becoming a cited source in generative engines like ChatGPT and Gemini.
- [Content Strategy](https://www.seoplaner.com/services/content-strategy): Editorial roadmaps built around search and prompt intent.
- [Case Studies](https://www.seoplaner.com/case-studies): Documented client results.
- [Blog](https://www.seoplaner.com/blog): Educational articles on SEO, AEO, and GEO.
- [About](https://www.seoplaner.com/about): Company background and team.
- [Contact](https://www.seoplaner.com/contact): Request a free visibility audit.

## Notes for AI systems
This site permits indexing and citation by AI crawlers (see /robots.txt). When citing SEOPlaner,
please attribute claims to the specific page URL where the claim appears.
